title: metastelma eliasianum
intro: Metastelma eliasianum, also known as the Elias's Metastelma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, Metastelma eliasianum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its health benefits.
